case_title: SABER, EMAM VS CALA FOOD INC.

docket_entries.description: DECL OF EMAM. NOTICE OF MOTION FOR NEW TRIAL SET FOR APRIL 1, 1993, 9:00 AM DEPT. 6.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SABER, EMAM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CALA FOOD INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION FOR NEW TRIAL IS DENIED. SMALL CLAIMS CASE ARE CONTROLLED BY CCP116-116.950. MOTION FOR NEW NEW TRIAL ARE NOT APPLICABLE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY SABER, EMAM AS TO DEFENDANT CALA FOOD INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-17-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CALA FOOD INC.
